course_title: RAD LAB - CT, MRI, AND DSA PHYSICS
description: Provides hands on experience using and testing computerized tomography (CT), magnetic resonance imaging (MRI), and digital subtraction angiography (DSA) systems.  Image quality, MRI and radiation safety, accreditation, and regulatory compliance issues with these modalities are also covered.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: B M E/​MED PHYS  580and578or declared in Medical Physics VISP
